snippet.title: Kapuso Mo, Jessica Soho: 10-ANYOS NA BATA, NAG-AARARO PARA MAGKAROON NG PANGTUSTOS SA PAMILYA
snippet.description:
Aired (May 23, 2021): Sa murang edad na 10, napipilitan si Reymark mag-araro ng dalawang ektaryang bukirin para lang magkaroon ng pambili ng sardinas at gamot para sa kanyang pamilya. Panoorin ang video.

Para sa mga nais tumulong kay Reymark, maaaring magdeposito sa bank account ng kanyang Lola Nerie:

BANK: LANDBANK OF THE PHILIPPINES
ACCOUNT NAME: NERIE P. MARIANO
ACCOUNT NUMBER: 2456 2340 06
CONTACT NUMBER: 0955 490 2743 / 09659929046
BRANCH ADDRESS: LBP Bldg, Siongco Street Corner National Highway, Isulan, Sultan Kudarat


'Kapuso Mo, Jessica Soho' is GMA Network's highest-rating magazine show. Hosted by the country's most awarded broadcast journalist Jessica Soho, it features stories on food, urban legends, trends, and pop culture. 'KMJS' airs every Sunday, 8:40 PM on GMA Network.

Subscribe to youtube.com/gmapublicaffairs for our full episodes. #KMJS

Watch the latest episodes of your favorite GMA Public Affairs shows #WithMe. Stay #AtHome and subscribe to GMA Public Affairs' official YouTube channel and click the bell button to catch the latest videos.

GMA Network promotes healthy debate and conversation online.  Any abusive language that does not facilitate productive discourse will be blocked from this post. 
   
GMA Network upholds ethical standards of fairness, objectivity, accuracy, transparency, balance, and independence. 

Walang Kinikilingan, Walang Pinoprotektahan, Serbisyong totoo lamang.
 
Subscribe to the GMA Public Affairs channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/gmapublicaffairs

Visit the GMA News and Public Affairs Portal: http://www.gmanews.tv

Twitter: http://www.twitter.com/gma_pa

snippet.title: (FILIPINO) MPL-PH S7 Playoffs Day 2
snippet.description:
Lalong umiinit ang mga bakbakan ngayong Day 2 ng #MPLPH Season 7 Playoffs! Sa Lower Bracket, makakatapat ni Hate from ONIC Philippines ang kanyang former team na Execration! Which team will live to fight another day sa ating playoffs? Sa second series, magsasalpukan naman ang defending champion Bren Esports at ang Blacklist International para sa last seat ng Upper Bracket Finals!

Match Schedule:
4:00 PM - ONIC Philippines vs Execration
6:30 PM - Bren Esports vs Blacklist International

#BeLegendary #MLBBEsports #SmartMPL #DoubleGigaGames

snippet.title: BTS "Butter" - The Late Show with Stephen Colbert
snippet.description:
Global pop icons BTS return to perform their record-smashing new hit, "Butter," ahead of their upcoming livestream event BTS 2021 MUSTER SOWOOZOO which takes place on June 13th and 14th. If you missed it, scroll back to watch RM, Jin, SUGA, j-hope, Jimin, V, and Jung Kook teach Stephen Colbert some new hand gestures in a hilarious Late Show comedy bit! #BTSonLSSC #Butter #BTS

Subscribe To "The Late Show" Channel: http://bit.ly/ColbertYouTube
Watch full episodes of "The Late Show": http://bit.ly/1Puei40
Like "The Late Show" on Facebook: http://on.fb.me/1df139Y
Follow "The Late Show" on Twitter: http://bit.ly/1dMzZzG
Follow "The Late Show" on Instagram: http://bit.ly/29wfREj

Watch The Late Show with Stephen Colbert weeknights at 11:35 PM ET/10:35 PM CT. Only on CBS.

---
The Late Show with Stephen Colbert is the premier late night talk show on CBS, airing at 11:35pm EST, streaming online via Paramount+, and delivered to the International Space Station on a USB drive taped to a weather balloon. Every night, viewers can expect: Comedy, humor, funny moments, witty interviews, celebrities, famous people, movie stars, bits, humorous celebrities doing bits, funny celebs, big group photos of every star from Hollywood, even the reclusive ones, plus also jokes.

snippet.title: Cooking Viral Tiktok Recipes Blindfolded with Anne Curtis (Feta Pasta and Tuna Onigiri)
snippet.description:
We’re #CenturyTunafy-ing TikTok’s viral feta pasta and the classic onigiri!

Leave a comment below if you were rooting for Anne the whole time. 

Read the #CenturyTunafy full mechanics here: bit.ly/CenturyTunafyMechanics_

-----------------------
Jump to
Intro (0:00)

FETA PASTA (1:25)
2 cups of cooked pasta
2 cups of cherry tomatoes
2 small red onions
4 cloves of garlic
salt and pepper
extra virgin olive oil
2 cans of Century Tuna Flakes in Oil
2 tsp of red chilli flakes
150g feta cheese
handful of basil

Taste Test #1 (8:25)

TUNA ONIGIRI (9:07)
2 cups of cooked sushi rice
1 tbsp rice vinegar
1 tsp white sugar
nori sheets
2 cans of Century Tuna Hot and Spicy 
2 tbsp of mayonnaise
1 tsp of Sriracha
handful of chopped green onions
1 tbsp of furikake or Toasted sesame seeds.

Taste Test #2 (16:00)
Bloopers (19:17)
-----------------------

We are looking for collaborators, content producers, brands, and anyone who has a story to tell. Email us at hello@thefatkidinside.com

snippet.title: EVERGLOW (에버글로우) - FIRST MV
snippet.description:
#EVERGLOW #에버글로우 #Last_Melody 

EVERGLOW [Last Melody] FIRST MV 

[EVERGLOW SNS] 

YOUTUBE : https://youtube.com/c/EVERGLOWOFFICIAL
APPLE MUSIC : https://apple.co/34eCQNR
Spotify : https://spoti.fi/3oVoUC8
FAN CAFE : http://cafe.daum.net/EVERGLOW
Twitter : https://twitter.com/EVERGLOW_twt
STAFF Twitter : https://twitter.com/EVERGLOW_STAFF
V-LIVE : https://channels.vlive.tv/B848DD/home
Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/official_everglow/
Weibo : https://www.weibo.com/u/6809008428?topnav=1&wvr=6&topsug=1&is_hot=1
Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/EVERGLOW.0321
TikTok : https://www.tiktok.com/@everglowofficial?lang=ko-KR
Melon : http://kko.to/xzslE6xDT
Genie : https://www.genie.co.kr/detail/artistInfo?xxnm=80682661 

혼돈의 유니버스, 어둠을 걷어내고 새로운 빛을 창조하는 여섯 전사들의 귀환!

더 강력해진 퍼포먼스와 카리스마로 아름다움을 재정의 한다. 글로벌 루키를 넘어 K-POP 아이콘으로, 에버글로우가 만들어가는 새로운 시작, ‘First’. 

드디어 기다림은 끝났다. 8개월의 공백기를 깨고 여섯 전사들이 세 번째 싱글앨범 ‘Last Melody’를 가지고 귀환했다. 에버글로우가 가진 무한한 카리스마와 시그니처 세계관을 여실히 보여줄 이번 앨범은 전세계 K-POP 팬들의 기대를 단숨에 충족시킬 것이다. 

타이틀곡 ‘First’는 어둠에 당당히 맞서 희망의 빛을 찾아 새로운 세계의 시작을 연다는 패기를 담고 있다. 웅장한 오프닝으로 막을 여는 ‘First’는 강렬한 트랩 비트, 인상적인 보컬과 멜로디, ‘찾아보는 무대 맛집’ 에버글로우의 파워풀한 퍼포먼스가 결합되어 대서사극을 매력적으로 완성시킨다.

드디어 기다림은 끝났다. 8개월의 공백기를 깨고 여섯 전사들이 세 번째 싱글앨범 ‘Last Melody’를 가지고 귀환했다. 에버글로우가 가진 무한한 카리스마와 시그니처 세계관을 여실히 보여줄 이번 앨범은 전세계 K-POP 팬들의 기대를 단숨에 충족시킬 것이다. 

타이틀곡 ‘First’는 어둠에 당당히 맞서 희망의 빛을 찾아 새로운 세계의 시작을 연다는 패기를 담고 있다. 웅장한 오프닝으로 막을 여는 ‘First’는 강렬한 트랩 비트, 인상적인 보컬과 멜로디, ‘찾아보는 무대 맛집’ 에버글로우의 파워풀한 퍼포먼스가 결합되어 대서사극을 매력적으로 완성시킨다.

东京复仇者
===========
Episode 07 : Revive
Episode Summary : 
Takemichi returned to the past and did his best to stop the fight between Tokyo Manji Gang and Moebius from starting, but Mikey and Pah-chin's will remain unchanged. Then, the president of Moebius, Osanai, showed up along with his fellow Moebius members to pull a surprise attack on Toman. Fueled by range, Pah-chin challenged Osanai on a one-on-one fight, but he was no match for Osanai who's two years older than him. In the middle of all that, Mikey did nothing as he stared at Pah-chin.

snippet.title: WARRIORS at LAKERS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | May 19, 2021
snippet.description:
WARRIORS at LAKERS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | May 19, 2021

The Los Angeles Lakers defeated the Golden State Warriors, 103-100. LeBron James recorded a triple-double with 22 PTS, 11 REB and 10 AST for the Lakers, including the go-ahead 3PM with 58.2 seconds remaining in regulation, while Anthony Davis added 25 PTS (20 in the 2nd half) and 12 REB in the victory. Stephen Curry led all scorers with 37 PTS and 7 REB for the Warriors in the losing effort.

With tonight’s victory, the Lakers have secured the No. 7 seed in the Western Conference and will face the Phoenix Suns in the first round of the 2021 NBA Playoffs, while the Warriors will face the Grizzlies on Friday, May 21 at 9pm/et on ESPN, with the winner securing the No. 8 seed in the Western Conference of the 2021 NBA Playoffs.

0:00-1Q
1:13-2Q
3:17-3Q
6:04-4Q

About fliptopbattles:
FlipTop Kru Corp. is a self-produced events and artist management company with its first product in the FlipTop Battle League. The FlipTop Battle League is the Philippines’ first premier – and the world’s most-viewed – rap battle league. It is popularly credited for the resurgence and widespread acceptance of hiphop culture in the Philippines since its inception in February 2010, and continues to champion all other hiphop elements in its variety of events and online content. It is home to the country’s top Hiphop talents and houses divisions in the main island groups of Luzon, Visayas, and Mindanao.

Lyrics:

Meron akong sasabihin
Sana’y ‘wag mong mamasamain
Pakinggan aking bilin
Nang ‘di ka malagay sa alanganin

CHORUS
‘Wag na ‘wag ka na papayag na masaktan
‘Wag na ‘wag ka na papayag na malamangan
‘Wag na ‘wag ka nang papayag
Iiyak ka na naman
Kung ganun lang din naman ay ‘wag na ‘wag na lang
Pakita mo sa kanila na kaya mo ‘to
Pagkat ‘di lang naman siya ang lalaki sa mundo
Kung ‘di niya talaga makita'ng kagandahan mo
Ay ‘di naman siya talagang kawalan sa’yo

Marami siyang gagawin
Para ika’y mabalik sa kanyang piling
Tandaan mo aking bilin
Nang ‘di ka malagay sa alanganin

‘Wag na ‘wag ka nang papayag

Pagkat ‘di lang naman siya ang lalaki sa mundo
Kung ‘di niya talaga makita'ng kagandahan mo
Ay ‘di naman siya talagang kawalan sa’yo

snippet.title: HOW TO GO THROUGH THE DRESS CODE 👗🎀💂‍♂️|| #SHORTS
snippet.description:
#Shorts​​​​​​​​​​​​​​ #YouTubeShorts​​​​​​​​​​​​​​ #5MCSHORTS​​​​​​​​​​​​​​ #SHORTVIDEO​​​​​​​​​​​​​​ #SHORTSINDIA​​​​​​​​​​​​

snippet.title: ENHYPEN Sings BTS, TWICE, and "Drunk-Dazed" in a Game of Song Association | ELLE
snippet.description:
They may only be 6 months into their career, but the boys of #ENHYPEN aren't your average rookies. With already millions of fans, a spot on the Billboard charts, and multiple global awards under their belt, the group has their eye on their next challenge – #SongAssociation. Tune in as they sing BTS, Lauv, and hits off their sophomore EP, #BORDERCARNIVAL in a race against our buzzer! snippet.title: Most DANGEROUS Food in Vietnam!!! RARE Thai Village Cooking!!! | TRIBAL VIETNAM EP3
snippet.description:
🎥 SECOND CHANNEL!!! MORE BEFRS » http://bit.ly/2pQYjvM​
👕 MICRO INFLUENCER MERCH » https://bit.ly/ShopBEFRS
💗 SUPPORT OUR MISSION » http://bit.ly/BestEverPatreon
📷 ANDREW’S YOUTUBE » https://bit.ly/Power-Up-YT
 
Like our music? Enjoy a free 30-day of Epidemic Sound for the best royalty free music: http://share.epidemicsound.com/BEFRS 
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
BLACK THAI JUMPING FISH 

1. MR. KINH’S FAMILY HOME
ADDRESS: Tu Le Ward, Van Chan District, Yen Bai Province
 
🍚STICKY RICE IN BAMBOO: Wash the rice and place it in the bamboo. Add water. Cover the upper part with phrynium leaves and grill over a fire. Use a machete to cut the bamboo bark. Serve with sour buffalo skin. 
 
🐃SOUR BUFFALO SKIN: Grill the buffalo skin and remove the hair. Boil the skin for 45 to 60 minutes. Cut the skin into thin slices and season with galangal, chilis and salt. Place in a jar for 5 to 7 days to ferment the skin.
 
🐟SOUR DECOMPOSED FISH: Cut the fish in big chunks. Roast the rice then pound it into a powder. Season fish with galangal, lemongrass, chillies, rice powder and salt. Place it in a jar for 3 to 7 days. 
 
🐟THAI TRADITIONAL GRILLED FISH: Cut the fish open and remove the gastric acid. Marinate in lemongrass, chillies, perilla leaves, Thai pepper, salt, and minced local stinky leaves. Place inside the fish then fold fish in half. Place fish on a bamboo skewer and grill for 30 minutes. 
 
🐟FISH GASTRIC ACID DIPPING SAUCE: In a bowl, add the fish gut, local stinky leaves, salt and perilla. Pour the mixture into a bamboo trunk. Use phrynium leaves as a cork. Grill the bamboo trunk for 20 minutes. Pour it out and serve as a dipping sauce.
 
🌱GRILLED MOSS IN BAMBOO: Wash the moss and chop in small pieces. Season with garlic, chillies, lemongrass, shallot, and cilantro. Place phrynium leaves in the bamboo trunk, then add the moss in and grill on fire for 20 minutes. Remove from the bamboo and serve. 
 
🐟JUMPING FISH SALAD: Cut the banana blossom into thin slices. Squeeze it in water with salt. Mince the fish mint and normal mint. Add a bit of salt to the veggie mix. Add sour juice made from bamboo shoot pickle juice.
 
#BestEverVietnamTour #BestEverFoodReviewShow #BEFRS
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
💬COME SAY HI:
INSTAGRAM » http://bit.ly/BestEverInstagram (@besteverfoodreviewshow)
FACEBOOK » http://bit.ly/BEFRSFacebook
 
💗SUPPORT OUR MISSION:
Patreon is a platform that allows people to support creators on a recurring basis. Your contribution is an investment in the creative freedom of my channel and enables me to keep my content authentic and uninterrupted. Your generous donation allows me the time and resources to create more videos for you. We also have some pretty sweet rewards, exclusive to Patreon Bestys. » http://bit.ly/BestEverPatreon
 
Our VIP Patrons: Jack Li, Stephen Balasta, Louis Chisari, Ryan Rhodes, Paul Citulski, Matthew Holden, David Baliles, Jackson Li, John Logan and Summer & Grayson Stumpf.  
 
🥒 ABOUT BEFRS:
Hey, I’m Sonny! I’m from the US but currently call Vietnam home. I’ve been living in Asia for 10 years and started making food and travel videos to document my experiences. I travel to different parts of the world, hunting down and documenting the most unique food each country has to offer. 
 
If you see any factual food errors in my videos, please feel free to politely let me know in the comments. I'm a huge fan of trying different, interesting foods in each country. My show is from a Western point of view, but more importantly, MY point of view. It is not meant to offend any person or culture. 
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

DIRECTOR OF PHOTOGRAPHY » Nguyễn Tân Khải
CAMERA OPERATOR » Nguyễn Minh Đức
VIDEO EDITOR » Lê Anh Đỗ
PRODUCER » Khoi Chung 
COLOR & MASTER » Quí Nguyễn

#AnneMarie #NiallHoran #OurSong

About Anne-Marie:
Anne-Marie has proved to be one of the UK’s most exciting and successful British breakthrough pop stars of recent years. A former 3x world karate champion and West End child star-turned 9x BRIT Award nominee, A-M’s rise has been nothing short of meteoric. In 2018 Anne-Marie released her debut album, ‘Speak Your Mind’ which featured the hit singles 'Alarm', 'Ciao Adios', 'Heavy', 'Friends', '2002' and 'Perfect to Me'. She subsequently ended that year as the UK’s biggest-selling debut artist, selling out headline shows and playing stadium dates supporting long-time friend and champion Ed Sheeran in the process.

She has also sang on and co-written many other hits such as Birthday, Rockabye, Don't Leave Me Alone,  To Be Young, f*ck, i'm lonely and Don't Play, collaborating with the likes of Clean Bandit, Marshmello, David Guetta, Lauv, Rudimental, Doja Cat and KSI, as well as starring on The Greatest Showman: Reimagined soundtrack performing Rewrite the stars alongside James Arthur.

She has also sang on and co-written many other hits such as Birthday, Rockabye, Don't Leave Me Alone,  To Be Young, f*ck, i'm lonely and Don't Play, collaborating with the likes of Clean Bandit, Marshmello, David Guetta, Lauv, Rudimental, Doja Cat and KSI, as well as starring on The Greatest Showman: Reimagined soundtrack performing Rewrite the stars alongside James Arthur.

snippet.title: 喝的是茶，过的是生活 Tea is more than a drink, but a lifestyle.丨Liziqi Channel
snippet.description:
Please  subscribe to 【李子柒 Liziqi 】Liziqi Channel on YouTube if you like my videos: https://goo.gl/nkjpSx 
#李子柒#Liziqi#lýtửthất#ChineseCuisine #ChineseFood

千年前，神奇的东方树叶从这里飘向全世界
今年谷雨前后，终于记着拍了这个视频
炒了绿茶，又窖制了些花茶
喝茶这件事呢？
既可以是精致高雅的茶艺；也可以是充满人间烟火的平常。
这大抵就是茶的包容吧！
Thousands of years ago, a magic leaf travelled worldwide from China.
And this year, around Grain Rain, I went tea picking before the best season is gone.
Then I roasted green tea and scented some with flowers!
For me, drinking tea is as much of high art as everyday life--
that’s the essence of inclusiveness. 

 【李子柒 Liziqi 】 https://goo.gl/nkjpSx

es.title: Bebe té, vive la vida | Liziqi
es.description:
Please  subscribe to 【李子柒 Liziqi 】Liziqi Channel on YouTube if you like my videos: https://goo.gl/nkjpSx 
#李子柒#Liziqi#lýtửthất#ChineseCuisine #ChineseFood

千年前，神奇的东方树叶从这里飘向全世界
今年谷雨前后，终于记着拍了这个视频
炒了绿茶，又窖制了些花茶
喝茶这件事呢？
既可以是精致高雅的茶艺；也可以是充满人间烟火的平常。
这大抵就是茶的包容吧！
Thousands of years ago, a magic leaf travelled worldwide from China.
And this year, around Grain Rain, I went tea picking before the best season is gone.
Then I roasted green tea and scented some with flowers!
For me, drinking tea is as much of high art as everyday life--
that’s the essence of inclusiveness. 
---------------------------------------------------------------
Hace miles de años, las hojas maravillosas del Este se desplazaron de aquí al mundo.
Antes y después de Guyu este año, finalmente recordé hacer este video.
Hice té verde y té perfumado.
¿Qué opinas sobre beber té?
Puede ser un arte de té exquisito y elegante, también puede ser normal de toque humano.
Esta es probablemente la inclusividad del té.

 【李子柒 Liziqi 】 https://goo.gl/nkjpSx

ja.title: 飲んでいるのはお茶で、楽しんているのは生活です｜李子柒 | 丨Liziqi Channel
ja.description:
Please  subscribe to 【李子柒 Liziqi 】Liziqi Channel on YouTube if you like my videos: https://goo.gl/nkjpSx 
#李子柒#Liziqi#lýtửthất#ChineseCuisine #ChineseFood

千年前，神奇的东方树叶从这里飘向全世界
今年谷雨前后，终于记着拍了这个视频
炒了绿茶，又窖制了些花茶
喝茶这件事呢？
既可以是精致高雅的茶艺；也可以是充满人间烟火的平常。
这大抵就是茶的包容吧！
Thousands of years ago, a magic leaf travelled worldwide from China.
And this year, around Grain Rain, I went tea picking before the best season is gone.
Then I roasted green tea and scented some with flowers!
For me, drinking tea is as much of high art as everyday life--
that’s the essence of inclusiveness. 

数千年前、この不思議な葉が中国から世界中に伝えました
今年の穀雨のあたりで、ようやく茶を摘みに行きました
私は緑茶を焙煎し、花でいくつかの香りを付けました
じゃ、お茶を飲むことは？
高雅な芸術であり、俗世の日常生活でもあります。
これがお茶の包括性だろう！

Welcome To Demon School! Iruma-kun Season 2
入间同学入魔了 第2季
===========
Episode 06 : Royal One
Episode Summary : 
Due to the actions of the avatar of the Ring of the Gobbler, Ali-san, Iruma has entered into an Evil Cycle. His classmates were bewildered but impressed by his uncharacteristically formidable behaviour. When Iruma realized how bad the conditions of the Abnormal Class classroom are, he went to the teacher-in-charge, Kalego-sensei, with a proposal. That is, to move their class to the most valuable place in Demon School Babyls, the King's Classroom - "Royal One"! Suddenly faced with an unreasonable proposal, Kalego set out one requirement.

snippet.title: KASO NG SPECIAL CHILD NA BINARIL NG PULIS, INAKSYUNAN!
snippet.description:
MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

Gayunpaman, puwede ninyong i-PM ang inyong mga sumbong sa OFFICIAL Facebook page ni Idol na RAFFY TULFO IN ACTION na may mahigit 18 MILLION Followers. Nakahanda pong tumugon sa inyo ang RTIA researchers.

Maraming salamat sa inyong pag-unawa at mag-ingat po tayong lahat!

snippet.title: The Weeknd - The Weeknd – Save Your Tears (Live on The 2021 Billboard Music Awards)
snippet.description:
“Save Your Tears” (Live at The 2021 Billboard Music Awards) 

'After Hours' available everywhere now: http://theweeknd.co/afterhoursYD 

►Subscribe to The Weeknd on YouTube: http://theweeknd.co/subscribeYD 

►Get exclusive merch: shop.theweeknd.com 

►Follow The Weeknd:
https://twitter.com/theweeknd
https://www.facebook.com/theweeknd
https://www.instagram.com/theweeknd
https://www.theweeknd.com 

Directed by Alex Lill
Produced by Brendan Garrett
Production Company:  Bucket Pictures 

Lyrics:

Ooh
Na na, yeah
I saw you dancing in a crowded room
You look so happy when I'm not with you
But then you saw me, caught you by surprise
A single teardrop falling from your eye
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
You could've asked me why I broke your heart
You could've told me that you fell apart
But you walked past me like I wasn't there
And just pretended like you didn't care
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Take me back 'cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
So
I made you think that I would always stay
I said some things that I should never say
Yeah, I broke your heart like someone did to mine
And now you won't love me for a second time
I don't know why I run away, oh, girl
Said I make you cry when I run away
Girl, take me back 'cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
I realize that I'm much too late
And you deserve someone better
Save your tears for another day (Ooh, yeah)
Save your tears for another day (Yeah)
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Save your tears for another day, ooh, girl (Ah)
I said save your tears for another day (Ah)
Save your tears for another day (Ah)
Save your tears for another day (Ah)

#TheWeeknd #SaveYourTears #AfterHours

http://vevo.ly/rVTlPK

snippet.title: #5 MAVERICKS at #4 CLIPPERS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | May 25, 2021
snippet.description:
#5 MAVERICKS at #4 CLIPPERS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | May 25, 2021

Led by Luka Doncic’s 39 PTS, 7 REB and 7 AST, the No. 5 Dallas Mavericks defeated the No. 4 LA Clippers, 127-121, in Game 2. Additionally for the Mavericks, Tim Hardaway Jr. recorded a Playoff career-high 28 PTS (6 3PM) in the victory, while Kawhi Leonard tallied 41 PTS, 6 REB and 4 AST for the Clippers in the losing effort. The Mavericks lead this best-of-seven series, 2-0.

snippet.title: Live: Supermoon and red blood lunar eclipse happening at once
snippet.description:
Observers in different areas of the world, including Oceania, Hawaii, eastern Asia and Antarctica, could witness a lunar eclipse that coincides with the moon's closest approach to Earth – making it a "supermoon" eclipse that will turn the moon red – also known as a "super blood moon." CGTN brings live coverage of the "#supermoon" eclipse across the world, from the partial to full eclipse.

Lunar eclipses occur when the moon is opposite the sun. Usually, we see a full moon when this happens, but every so often, the moon enters the Earth's shadow, resulting in an eclipse. This doesn't happen every full moon because the plane of the moon's orbit is tilted about 5 degrees from the plane of the Earth's orbit, and the moon "misses" the shadow of the Earth.

snippet.title: Inside Bretman Rock’s Colorful Hawaiian Villa | Open Door | Architectural Digest
snippet.description:
Today Architectural Digest is welcomed to Hawaii by the one and only Bretman Rock for a tour of his lush and vibrant villa. Situated between the mountains and the sea, the three-story mansion has been completely revamped in tandem with Hawaii-based interior design firm MCYIA. Filled to the brim with colorful, unique decor, Bretman’s home is a reflection of his “gay Asian immigrant success” fantasy come to life.

See more of Bretman's home here: https://www.architecturaldigest.com/story/inside-bretman-rocks-lush-hawaii-mansion

Season 1 of Bretman Rock’s reality show, MTV’s Following: Bretman Rock, is now available to stream on YouTube and MTV.
https://youtu.be/bYkhEdZeGFg
https://www.mtv.com/shows/mtvs-following-bretman-rock
#BretmanRock

Shop Bretman’s home style!
Him & Her Glossy Red Chairs by Fabio Novembre: https://fave.co/3via8aE
Roche Bobois Mah Jong Fabric Lounger: https://fave.co/2RxA57H

snippet.title: BTS Win Four BBMAs & Perform ‘Butter’ Live For the First Time | Billboard News
snippet.description:
For their debut performance of the new single ‘Butter,’ BTS unveiled a showcase at the 2021 Billboard Music Awards as smooth as the song title, highlighting the awards ceremony with the dance-pop spectacle on Sunday night (May 23) and no doubt delighting the Army watching around the world. Released on Friday (May 21), ‘Butter’ follows BTS singles like ‘Dynamite’ and ‘Life Goes On,’ both of which topped the Billboard Hot 100 chart in 2020. BTS entered the 2021 Billboard Music Awards as finalists in four categories -- Top Duo/Group, Top Song Sales Artist, the fan-voted Top Social Artist, and Top Selling Song (for “Dynamite”) -- and won in all four categories.

To learn more about this story: 
https://www.billboard.com/articles/news/awards/9576898/bts-performs-butter-2021-billboard-music-awards/

snippet.title: Inside the Battle for Jerusalem
snippet.description:
Israel’s bombing of Gaza has killed 213 people and Hamas rockets into Israel have killed 13. The latest violence between Israel and Palestine came after weeks of police aggression towards Palestinians in East Jerusalem. We embed with protesters in Sheikh Jarrah who face losing their homes as they wait to hear their fate in a case that’s gone all the way to the Supreme Court.

Subscribe to VICE News here: http://bit.ly/Subscribe-to-VICE-News

Check out VICE News for more: http://vicenews.com

ja.title: エルサレムを巡る戦いの内面
ja.description:
イスラエルによるガザの空爆で213人が死亡、ハマスによるイスラエルへのロケット弾攻撃で13人が死亡。今回のイスラエルとパレスチナの紛争は、数週間にわたる東エルサレムでのパレスチナ人に対する警察の攻撃の末に発生。住居を失う恐れの中、最高裁判まで争われている案件の判決を待つ抗議者に密着。

Subscribe to VICE News here: http://bit.ly/Subscribe-to-VICE-News

it.title: Dentro la battaglia per Gerusalemme
it.description:
I bombardamenti di Israele su Gaza hanno ucciso 213 persone e i razzi di Hamas verso Israele ne hanno uccise 13. La recente violenza tra Israele e Palestina arriva dopo settimane di aggressioni della polizia verso i palestinesi di Gerusalemme Est. Ci inseriamo tra i manifestanti di Sheikh Jarrah che rischiano di perdere le loro case, in attesa di conoscere il loro destino in un caso che è arrivato fino alla Corte Suprema.

Subscribe to VICE News here: http://bit.ly/Subscribe-to-VICE-News

id.title: Di Dalam Pertempuran Untuk Yerusalem
id.description:
Pengeboman Israel di Gaza telah menewaskan 213 orang dan roket Hamas ke Israel menewaskan 13 orang. Kekerasan terbaru antara Israel dan Palestina terjadi setelah berminggu-minggu adanya agresi polisi terhadap warga Palestina di Yerusalem Timur. Kami bergabung dengan para pengunjuk rasa di Sheikh Jarrah yang menghadapi ancaman kehilangan rumah mereka saat mereka menunggu untuk mendengar nasib mereka dalam kasus yang telah sampai ke Mahkamah Agung.

Subscribe to VICE News here: http://bit.ly/Subscribe-to-VICE-News

nl.title: In de strijd om Jeruzalem
nl.description:
Door Israëls bombardement op Gaza zijn 213 mensen gedood en de raketten die Hamas afvuurde op Israël hebben 13 mensen gedood. Het recente geweld tussen Israël en Palestina barstte los na weken van politieagressie tegen Palestijnen in Oost-Jeruzalem. We mengen ons tussen demonstranten in Sheikh Jarrah die geconfronteerd worden met het verlies van hun huizen terwijl ze afwachten wat hun lot zal zijn in een rechtszaak die helemaal tot bij het hooggerechtshof is terechtgekomen.

Subscribe to VICE News here: http://bit.ly/Subscribe-to-VICE-News

de.title: Inmitten der Schlacht um Jerusalem
de.description:
Bei der Bombardierung des Gazastreifens durch Israel wurden 213 Menschen getötet, bei Raketenangriffen der Hamas auf Israel 13 Menschen. Die jüngsten Ausschreitungen zwischen Israel und Palästina erfolgten nach wochenlangen Polizeiübergriffen auf Palästinenser in Ostjerusalem. Wir sprechen mit Demonstranten in Sheikh Jarrah, denen der Verlust ihrer Häuser droht, während sie auf eine Entscheidung in einem Fall warten, der bis vor den Obersten Gerichtshof geht.

Subscribe to VICE News here: http://bit.ly/Subscribe-to-VICE-News

ko.title: 예루살렘 전투의 내막
ko.description:
이스라엘이 가자지구를 폭격하여 213명이 사망했으며 하마스가 로켓포를 발사하여 13명이 숨졌습니다. 이스라엘과 팔레스타인 간 최근 폭력 사태는 동예루살렘에서 경찰이 몇 주 동안 팔레스타인인을 공격한 후 발생했습니다.  대법원까지 간 사건에서 어떤 결과가 나올지 운명을 기다리는 동안 자신의 집을 잃어가고 있는 셰이크 자라 시위자들의 모습을 담습니다. 

Subscribe to VICE News here: http://bit.ly/Subscribe-to-VICE-News

el.title: Στη Μάχη για την Ιερουσαλήμ
el.description:
Οι βομβαρδισμοί του Ισραήλ στη Γάζα έχουν σκοτώσει 213 ανθρώπους και οι ρουκέτες της Χαμάς εναντίον του Ισραήλ έχουν σκοτώσει 13. Οι πρόσφατες βίαιες συγκρούσεις μεταξύ Ισραήλ και Παλαιστίνης ήρθαν ύστερα από εβδομάδες αστυνομικών επιθέσεων προς τους Παλαιστίνιους στην Ανατολική Ιερουσαλήμ. Εισχωρήσαμε ανάμεσα στους διαδηλωτές στο Σέιχ Τζάρα, που κινδυνεύουν να χάσουν τα σπίτια τους, καθώς περιμένουν να μάθουν την τύχη τους σε μια υπόθεση που έχει φτάσει ως το Ανώτατο Δικαστήριο.

Subscribe to VICE News here: http://bit.ly/Subscribe-to-VICE-News

es.title: Dentro de la batalla por Jerusalén
es.description:
Los bombardeos de Israel sobre Gaza han matado a 213 personas y los cohetes de Hamás contra Israel han matado a 13. Los últimos episodios de violencia entre Israel y Palestina se producen tras semanas de agresiones policiales a los palestinos de Jerusalén Este. Nos reunimos con los manifestantes de Sheikh Jarrah que se enfrentan a perder sus casas mientras esperan conocer su destino en un caso que ha llegado hasta el Tribunal Supremo.

Subscribe to VICE News here: http://bit.ly/Subscribe-to-VICE-News

ar.title: في قلب الصراع على القدس.
ar.description:
قُتل 213 شخصًا جرّاء القصف الإسرائيلي على غزة، بينما تسببت صواريخ حماس باتجاه إسرائيل في مقتل 13. تأججت عمليات العنف بين فلسطين و إسرائيل على إثر اعتداءات الشرطة الإسرائيلية على الفلسطينيين طيلة أسابيع في القدس الشرقية. نحن نتضامن مع المحتجين في حيّ الشيخ جرّاح المعرّضين لفقد منازلهم بينما ينتظرون معرفة مصائرهم في قضية وصلت إلى المحكمة العليا.

Subscribe to VICE News here: http://bit.ly/Subscribe-to-VICE-News

en.title: Inside the Battle for Jerusalem
en.description:
Israel’s bombing of Gaza has killed 213 people and Hamas rockets into Israel have killed 13. The latest violence between Israel and Palestine came after weeks of police aggression towards Palestinians in East Jerusalem. We embed with protesters in Sheikh Jarrah who face losing their homes as they wait to hear their fate in a case that’s gone all the way to the Supreme Court.

Subscribe to VICE News here: http://bit.ly/Subscribe-to-VICE-News

Check out VICE News for more: http://vicenews.com

Follow VICE News here:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/vicenews

Instagram: http://instagram.com/vicenews
More videos from the VICE network: https://www.fb.com/vicevideo

#VICENews #News

ro.title: DIN CULISELE BĂTĂLIEI PENTRU IERUSALIM
ro.description:
Israelul a ucis 213 persoane în urma bombardamentelor din Gaza, iar rachetele Hamas trimise în Israel, 13. Ultimele violențe dintre Israel și Palestina s-au declanșat după săptămâni bune de agresiuni ale poliției asupra palestinienilor din Ierusalimul de Est. Ne-am alăturat protestatarilor din Sheikh Jarrah care se confruntă cu pierderea caselor în timp ce așteaptă rezultatul procesului care a ajuns tocmai la Curtea Supremă. 

Subscribe to VICE News here: http://bit.ly/Subscribe-to-VICE-News

snippet.title: GAME RECAP: Lakers 103, Warriors 100
snippet.description: The Lakers defeated the Warriors, 103-100. LeBron James recorded a triple-double with 22 points, 11 rebounds and 10 assists for the Lakers, including the go-ahead 3pt FG with 58.2 seconds remaining in regulation, while Anthony Davis added 25 points (20 in the 2nd half) and 12 rebounds in the victory. Stephen Curry led all scorers with 37 points and 7 rebounds for the Warriors in the losing effort.

snippet.description:
Part 1: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GrZbGB0t_kQ

Part 2: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=q-8zgr2Ov3w&t=0s

Part 3: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8AVlhakgeDc&t=15s

Part 4: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Cf0CiDZkj54&t=1280s

Part 5: https://youtu.be/Mv2Ylp9nuNw

MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

Gayunpaman, puwede ninyong i-PM ang inyong mga sumbong sa OFFICIAL Facebook page ni Idol na RAFFY TULFO IN ACTION na may mahigit 18 MILLION Followers. Nakahanda pong tumugon sa inyo ang RTIA researchers.

Maraming salamat sa inyong pag-unawa at mag-ingat po tayong lahat!

snippet.title: Galantis, David Guetta & Little Mix - Heartbreak Anthem (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Galantis, David Guetta & Little Mix - Heartbreak Anthem
Stream/DL: https://atlantic.lnk.to/HeartbreakAnthemID

Subscribe for more official content from Galantis: https://BigBeat.lnk.to/GalantisSubscribe

Follow Galantis
Facebook: http://smarturl.it/GalantisFb
Twitter: http://smarturl.it/GalantisTw
Instagram: http://smarturl.it/GalantisInsta

Follow David Guetta
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/DavidGuetta
Twitter: https://twitter.com/davidguetta
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/davidguetta/

Follow Little Mix
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/LittleMix
Twitter: https://twitter.com/LittleMix
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/littlemix/

(LYRICS)
Verse
Hello, it’s me your ex
I called to say not sorry but I wish you the best 
And I don’t hold no grudges, promise this ain’t a test, We ok, we ok
 
Pre
Sometimes it works out but sometimes it don’t
Maybe we’ll fix this or maybe we won’t 
Sometimes a heart can sink like a stone 
Until you find home 
 
Chorus
This ain’t a heartbreak anthem, I don’t care what happened but I ain’t got no time to dwell on it 
Don’t want to throw a tantrum, you did what you had to, no i ain’t got no time to dwell on it 
And I don’t wanna feel, I don’t wanna feel hollow
Chasing you and me, chasing all of these shadows
This ain’t a heartbreak anthem, I don’t care what happened, but I ain’t got no time to dwell on it.
 
Verse 2
Hello, it’s me your ex (again)
I didn’t want to call but there’s this pain in my chest
And thanks to you I’m wearing out this bulletproof vest but I’ll be ok, I’m ok
 
Pre
Sometimes it works out but sometimes it don’t
Maybe we’ll fix this or maybe we won’t 
Sometimes a heart can sink like a stone 
Until you find home 
 
Chorus
This ain’t a heartbreak anthem, I don’t care what happened but I ain’t got no time to dwell on it 
Don’t want to throw a tantrum, you did what you had to, no i ain’t got no time to dwell on it 
And I don’t wanna feel, I don’t wanna feel hollow
Chasing you and me, chasing all of these shadows
This ain’t a heartbreak anthem, I don’t care what happened, but I ain’t got no time to dwell on it.

snippet.title: Backyard Squirrel Maze 2.0- The Walnut Heist
snippet.description:
I bit off more than I could chew.  Join me this summer in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

NEW Phat Gus Merch here!! https://markrober.store/

More info about my Creative Engineering Course- 

This class is a hands-on, 30-day learning experience that will teach you how to use engineering and science to bring your creative ideas to life.

During this class, I'm going to share with you my entire creative engineering process from start to finish. You're going to follow along with me as I fully design and engineer 3 brand new builds from scratch... from how I come up with the idea, all the way through bringing the final builds to life.

The best part is, over the month, you'll follow along with me and my process, side by side, and you will leave the class with 3 original, creative builds of your own.

This is the class I wish I had when I was starting out. It's designed to take your skills to make cool stuff to the next level, whether you're a beginner or a more experienced maker/engineer.

The class officially starts on June 7th so claim your spot if you're interested!

See you in class!

-Mark

snippet.title: Josh Taylor Knocks Down Ramirez Twice, Becomes Undisputed Champion | FIGHT HIGHLIGHTS
snippet.description:
Watch #highlights from the undisputed world championship of the world featuring #JoseRamirez and #JoshTaylor. In the fight Taylor scored 2 knockouts to beat Ramirez by decision to become the Jr. Lightweight Undisputed Champion.

Next up for Top Rank Boxing, Two undefeated junior welterweight kings, one undisputed title. The stakes don’t get any higher.
 
WBC/WBO champion #JoseRamirez, the pride of California’s Central Valley, will fight Scotland’s IBF/WBA champion #JoshTaylor for the undisputed world championship Saturday, May 22. The winner will become only the second undisputed junior welterweight champion of the four-belt era, joining pound-for-pound great Terence “Bud” Crawford.
 
Promoted by Top Rank, #RamirezTaylor will be televised live on ESPN and ESPN Deportes (and simulcast on ESPN+) starting at 8:00 p.m. ET/5:00 p.m. PT. live from Las Vegas’ newest world-class casino resort, Virgin Hotels Las Vegas, part of Curio Collection by Hilton, owned by JC Hospitality, LLC.

Try ESPN+ For Free: https://watch.espnplus.com/toprank/

Subscribe to our YouTube channel to get notified about the latest highlights, free full fights, and fight week content as it's posted.

Follow Top Rank on Twitter: http://www.twitter.com/trboxing
Follow Top Rank on Instagram: http://www.instagram.com/toprank
Like Top Rank on Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/trboxing

snippet.title: BTS Teases FRIENDS REUNION Appearance and Talk Favorite Characters! (Exclusive)
snippet.description:
BTS chats with ET’s Lauren Zima about their new single, 'Butter,' and performing at the 2021 Billboard Music Awards remotely from Korea. The K-Pop stars open up about sharing their experiences of discrimination amid the rise in violent hate crimes against Asian Americans and Pacific Islanders. They also express how excited they are to make their Rolling Stone debut on the magazine’s June cover! In addition, BTS teases their upcoming appearance in ‘Friends: The Reunion,’ streaming May 27 on HBO Max.

Exclusives from #ETonline :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLQwITQ__CeH2Y_7g2xeiNDa0vQsROQQgv

snippet.title: Iron Dome: How Israel defends itself from Palestinian rockets
snippet.description:
More than 2000 rockets have been fired by Palestinian militant groups into Israel in the recent conflict at Gaza strip. This would have resulted in a huge loss for Israel but for the Iron Dome, a mobile all-weather air defense system, built by Israel which was funded and developed jointly with the US. The Iron Dome intercepted short-range rockets and artillery shells thereby saving many lives in Israel.

Bella Poarch - Build A B*tch 🎤

This ain’t Build a B*tch
You don’t get to pick and choose
Different ass and bigger boobs
If my eyes are brown or blue
This ain’t Build a B*tch
I’m filled with flaws and attitude
So if you need perfect, I’m not built for you

Bob the Builder broke my heart
Tell me I need fixing
Said that I’m just nuts and bolts
Lot of parts were missing
Curvy like a cursive font
Virgin and a vixen
That’s the kind of girl he wants
But he forgot

This ain’t Build a B*tch
You don’t get to pick and choose
Different ass and bigger boobs
If my eyes are brown or blue
This ain’t Build a B*tch
I’m filled with flaws and attitude
So if you need perfect, I’m not built for you

(La la la)

Boys are always playing golf
Looking for the Barbie
They don’t look like Ken at all
Hardly have a heart beat
Need someone who falls apart
So he can play prince charming
If that’s the kind of girl he wants
Then he forgot

This ain’t Build a B*tch
You don’t get to pick and choose
Different ass and bigger boobs
If my eyes are brown or blue
This ain’t Build a B*tch
I’m filled with flaws and attitude
So if you need perfect, I’m not built for you

(La la la)

snippet.title: Israel Unrest: Hamas launches rocket attack on Tel Aviv
snippet.description:
Tensions between Israel and Hamas have further escalated, with Hamas firing 130 rockets towards the city of Tel Aviv.

Health officials in Gaza said 28 Palestinians, including nine children, had been killed in Israeli airstrikes.

To read more on how the attacks started: https://news.sky.com/story/israel-hamas-launches-rocket-attack-on-tel-aviv-12303773

snippet.title: Friends: The Reunion | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
Our favorite friends are back on the set that started it all. Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, Matt LeBlanc, Matthew Perry, David Schwimmer, and special guests reunite to discuss everything from their casting process to whether or not Ross and Rachel were really on a break. Witness the unbreakable bond of the group that perfectly captured the moment in life when your friends become your family.

Stream Friends: The Reunion May 27 on HBO Max.

snippet.title: Binibini | (c) Zack Tabudlo | #AgsuntaSongRequests
snippet.description:
“Isayaw mo ako sa gitna ng ulan mahal ko, kapalit man nito’y buhay ko...” 🌔✨🌊


    ~~• Naranasan niyo na din bang magsayaw sa gitna ng ulan? yung sobrang MOMENT na MOMENT talaga ang datingan parang nasa movie house tapos bigla mo nalang marerealize na ay shet inlove ka na pala? alam niyo ba na it can take 2-3 seconds or sometimes a lifetime to truly fall inlove with a person? magkakaiba lang talaga tayong lahat ng tadhana pero imagine it will only take 2-3 seconds to make a person fall inlove with you, sometimes naman matagal it can take years and years pero pag di talaga naiinlove edi kahit ilang years pa yan kahit ilang sayaw pa yan sa ulan or kahit saan edi wala hahaha! ang point namin dito is, its really not the time that will decide eh, its the heart, pag kase nakuha mo, pag natamaan ka? yun na yun, within those 2-3 seconds? kayang ipagpalit ng isang taong inlove ang kanyang buhay para sa taong minamahal niya, gaya nalang ng kantang ito na napakaganda.... naranasan niyo na din bang mag sayaw sa gitna ng ulan? well eto ang isa sa most requested songs naten ngayon sa #AgsuntaSongRequests kaya here is our version of Zack Tabudlo’s song BINIBINI 💓

localized.title: Binibini | (c) Zack Tabudlo | #AgsuntaSongRequests
localized.description:
“Isayaw mo ako sa gitna ng ulan mahal ko, kapalit man nito’y buhay ko...” 🌔✨🌊


    ~~• Naranasan niyo na din bang magsayaw sa gitna ng ulan? yung sobrang MOMENT na MOMENT talaga ang datingan parang nasa movie house tapos bigla mo nalang marerealize na ay shet inlove ka na pala? alam niyo ba na it can take 2-3 seconds or sometimes a lifetime to truly fall inlove with a person? magkakaiba lang talaga tayong lahat ng tadhana pero imagine it will only take 2-3 seconds to make a person fall inlove with you, sometimes naman matagal it can take years and years pero pag di talaga naiinlove edi kahit ilang years pa yan kahit ilang sayaw pa yan sa ulan or kahit saan edi wala hahaha! ang point namin dito is, its really not the time that will decide eh, its the heart, pag kase nakuha mo, pag natamaan ka? yun na yun, within those 2-3 seconds? kayang ipagpalit ng isang taong inlove ang kanyang buhay para sa taong minamahal niya, gaya nalang ng kantang ito na napakaganda.... naranasan niyo na din bang mag sayaw sa gitna ng ulan? well eto ang isa sa most requested songs naten ngayon sa #AgsuntaSongRequests kaya here is our version of Zack Tabudlo’s song BINIBINI 💓

snippet.description:

snippet.title: ISRAEL PALESTINE 2021 EXPLAINED | The cause of conflict today | 7NEWS
snippet.description:
The conflict between Israeli forces and Hamas militants has escalated - and is on the verge of war. There are reports of Israeli troops making ground manoeuvers. They're the worst clashes seen in the region in years. But what started it? Here is our simplest explanation for what is one of the most contested regions on Earth. Conflict has raged here for generations, born of more than 100 years of struggle. This is the history, a timeline of the conflict in the Middle East - the battle over Gaza, the West Bank and Jerusalem.

snippet.title: Israel Strikes Gaza Home Of Hamas Leader, Building Housing Media Outlets | India Today
snippet.description:
Israel slammed the Gaza Strip with airstrikes, in a dramatic escalation that included bombing the home of a senior Hamas leader, killing a family of 10 in a refugee camp — most of them children — and pulverizing a high-rise that housed The Associated Press and other media.
The Hamas militant group continued a stream of rocket volleys into Israel, including a late-night barrage on Tel Aviv. One man was killed Saturday when a rocket hit his home in a suburb of the seaside metropolis.
With a U.S. envoy on the ground, calls increased for a cease-fire after five days of mayhem that have left at least 145 Palestinians dead in Gaza — including 41 children and 23 women — and eight dead on the Israeli side, all but one of them civilians, including a 5-year-old. President Joe Biden, who has called for a de-escalation but has backed Israel’s campaign, spoke separately by phone with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and Palestinian President Mahmoud Abbas. Watch full bulletin. 

#IsraelPalestineConflict #IndiaToday

snippet.title: ‘Full-scale war’ feared as fighting between Israel and Hamas escalates amid air strikes
snippet.description:
Subscribe to our YouTube channel for free here: 
https://sc.mp/subscribe-youtube

Spiralling violence between Israel and Hamas Islamists is “escalating towards a full-scale war”, the UN envoy for Middle East Peace warned on May 11, 2021. Tor Wennesland’s statement followed a day that saw the Palestinian militant group fire more than 600 rockets at Israel, which responded with hundreds of air strikes. The violence has left at least 30 Palestinians and three Israelis dead, with many more injured in the two days of fighting following rising tensions in Jerusalem at the start of the Muslim fasting month of Ramadan.

snippet.title: Israeli Iron Dome filmed intercepting rockets from Gaza
snippet.description:
Sirens blared in the coastal Israeli city of Ashkelon as the Iron Dome missile defence system intercepted rockets in the sky.

Subscribe to The Telegraph on YouTube ► https://bit.ly/3idrdLH

Despite having a high rate of success the system doesn't stop every attack and rockets fired from Gaza killed two women in Asheklon.

For the latest on Israel please visit: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/israel/

Get the latest headlines: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/

Telegraph.co.uk and YouTube.com/TelegraphTV are websites of The Telegraph, the UK's best-selling quality daily newspaper providing news and analysis on UK and world events, business, sport, lifestyle and culture.

#israel #gaza #ashkelon

snippet.title: How Is Israel’s Iron Dome Defence System Helping It Counter Palestine’s Rocket Attacks?
snippet.description:
The Iron Dome is a ground-to-air, short-range, air defence system that neutralises rockets and missiles. The concept was born after the 2006 Israel-Lebanon War when Israel faced thousands of rockets fired by Hezbollah. Israel's Iron Dome missile defence system took years to develop and was tested in combat for the first time in April 2011. The system is designed to intercept short-range missiles and rockets coming in from Gaza.
#GazaCrisis #IsraelPalestineConflict #IronDome

snippet.description:
Days of cross-border violence between Israel and Hamas show no signs of abating. Caught in the crossfire however are thousands of Palestinians. As air raids and bombing damage buildings and houses in Gaza, Palestinians escape their homes seeking refuge in schools.

snippet.title: How Israel’s Iron Dome Works
snippet.description:
Israel’s Iron Dome missile-defense system is designed to intercept and destroy short-range rockets and mortars. During the recent conflict, it has been used to destroy more than 200 rockets bound for Israeli cities. Here’s how it works. Photo: Ilia Yefimovich/Getty Images

snippet.title: Day In The Life Of A Tough Mama!
snippet.description:
It is really a blessing to be able to do the things that you love for your family! To all the Tough Mama’s out there, Happy Mother’s day! Sharing with you all these handy dandy cute little Tough Mama appliances which will truly help us make our chores a lot more easier!

Tough Mama is available online. Visit Tough Mama Facebook page and Instagram @toughmamaappliances

#ToughMamaAndi

Philmar's Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/chepoxz/

Incase you missed our fun surf sessions with Papa and Lilo...
